message:
bd-ml2r.4.2: add pathological cycle corpus and regression harness

Fixtures:
- cycle_scc_heavy.mmd: Multiple SCCs with inter-component edges
- cycle_braid.mmd: Interleaved crossing paths forming cycles
- cycle_ladder.mmd: Parallel chains with rung connections
- cycle_feedback.mmd: Control loops with nested feedback

Regression harness (fm-regression-harness crate):
- Renders all .mmd fixtures in input directory
- Computes quality metrics for flowchart/state diagrams:
  - Edge crossing count (segment intersection detection)
  - Edge length stddev (uniformity measure)
  - Back-edge count (edges against flow direction)
  - Cycle count, total/mean edge length
- Generates JSON + HTML reports with side-by-side golden comparison
- Supports --update-goldens and --fail-on-mismatch flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+flowchart TD
+  %% Braid pattern: Interleaved crossing paths forming multiple cycles
+  %% Tests: crossing minimization, edge routing under high overlap
+
+  %% Top row
+  T1 --> M1
+  T1 --> M2
+  T2 --> M1
+  T2 --> M2
+  T3 --> M2
+  T3 --> M3
+
+  %% Middle row - cross connections
+  M1 --> B1
+  M1 --> B2
+  M2 --> B1
+  M2 --> B2
+  M2 --> B3
+  M3 --> B2
+  M3 --> B3
+
+  %% Back edges creating cycles
+  B1 --> T1
+  B2 --> T2
+  B3 --> T3
+
+  %% Additional cross-braid edges
+  M1 --> M2
+  M2 --> M3
+  B1 --> M2
+  B2 --> M1

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+flowchart TD
+  %% Feedback loop pattern: Multiple control loops with shared nodes
+  %% Tests: back-edge detection, nested cycle handling
+
+  %% Main forward path
+  Input --> Process1
+  Process1 --> Process2
+  Process2 --> Process3
+  Process3 --> Output
+
+  %% Primary feedback loop
+  Output --> Monitor
+  Monitor --> Controller
+  Controller --> Process1
+
+  %% Secondary feedback loop (inner)
+  Process2 --> Sensor
+  Sensor --> Adjuster
+  Adjuster --> Process1
+
+  %% Tertiary feedback loop (nested)
+  Process3 --> Validator
+  Validator --> Process2
+
+  %% Error recovery loop
+  Monitor --> ErrorHandler
+  ErrorHandler --> Input
+
+  %% Cross-loop interaction
+  Controller --> Sensor
+  Validator --> Monitor

@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+flowchart TD
+  %% Ladder pattern: Parallel chains with rung connections and back edges
+  %% Tests: rank assignment stability, parallel edge handling
+
+  %% Left spine
+  L1 --> L2
+  L2 --> L3
+  L3 --> L4
+  L4 --> L5
+
+  %% Right spine
+  R1 --> R2
+  R2 --> R3
+  R3 --> R4
+  R4 --> R5
+
+  %% Rungs connecting spines
+  L1 --> R1
+  R1 --> L1
+  L2 --> R2
+  R2 --> L2
+  L3 --> R3
+  R3 --> L3
+  L4 --> R4
+  R4 --> L4
+  L5 --> R5
+  R5 --> L5
+
+  %% Back edges creating vertical cycles
+  L3 --> L1
+  R4 --> R2
+  L5 --> L2
+  R5 --> R1

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+flowchart TD
+  %% SCC-heavy: Multiple strongly connected components with inter-SCC edges
+  %% Tests: dense cycle detection, component isolation
+
+  %% SCC 1: Triangle
+  A1 --> A2
+  A2 --> A3
+  A3 --> A1
+
+  %% SCC 2: Square
+  B1 --> B2
+  B2 --> B3
+  B3 --> B4
+  B4 --> B1
+
+  %% SCC 3: Pentagon
+  C1 --> C2
+  C2 --> C3
+  C3 --> C4
+  C4 --> C5
+  C5 --> C1
+
+  %% Inter-SCC edges (non-cyclic)
+  A2 --> B1
+  B3 --> C1
+  A3 --> C4

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@

+name = "fm-regression-harness"
